LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT BY FILING DOE AMENDMENT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 2, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 19, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of And Motion To Amend Complaint By Filing Doe Amendment
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The tentative ruling was uncontested and adopted by the Court. PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Amend Complaint By Filing Doe Amendment is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order that was submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of And Motion To Amend Complaint By Filing Doe Amendment
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Continued To Dec-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Amend Complaint By Filing Doe Amendment is continued to December 2, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 19, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
